name: That Wacky Magic!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>暴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>走</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>する<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>力</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Banish all Spell Cards from your Graveyard; destroy all face-up monsters your opponent controls with DEF less than or equal to the number of Spell Cards you banished x 300.
eff: Banish all Spell Cards from your Graveyard; destroy all face-up monsters your opponent controls with DEF less than or equal to the number of Spell Cards you banished x 300.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
